executives.name: David Awram
executives.background: Mr. Awram is a co-founder of Sandstorm. Previously, he was the Director of Investor Relations for Silver Wheaton Corp. He holds a Bachelor of Science degree in Geology.

executives.name: Elif Lévesque
executives.background: Ms. Lévesque is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in finance and the mining industry. She was a founder of Nomad Royalty Company.

executives.name: Erfan Kazemi
executives.background: Mr. Kazemi is the Chief Financial Officer of Sandstorm. Prior to joining Sandstorm, he was a Senior Manager at PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant (BC), a Chartered Financial Analyst charterholder, and holds a Bachelor of Science degree.

board_of_directors.name: David Awram
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Awram is a co-founder of Sandstorm. Previously, he was the Director of Investor Relations for Silver Wheaton Corp. He holds a Bachelor of Science degree in Geology.
